name: Brave
philosophy: Brave's web presence is privacy-first browser chrome — Brave Orange (#fb542b) as the brand voltage on CTAs, dark canvas (#13141b) on the marketing surface, and a typography stack that pairs a modern display sans with a clean body. The atmosphere is privacy-as-feature: confident, slightly contrarian, and built around the message 'the web you deserve, without the surveillance.'

design_language.motion_signature: Confident product-led motion — browser screenshot mockups have subtle scroll-reveal animations, the lion brand mark has occasional idle paw gestures. Hover lift on cards (1.02 + 200ms ease). The motion is restrained-confident.

trademark_signals: Brave Orange (#fb542b) — chromatic voltage on CTAs and brand accents
Lion brand mark — the privacy-protective mascot
Dark canvas (#13141b) on marketing — privacy-as-feature aesthetic
Browser-mockup heroes — Brave browser screenshots with shields/privacy chrome highlighted
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace the dark canvas with white — privacy-as-feature brand lives on dark
Don't sanitize the lion brand mark to a generic shield
Don't tint Brave Orange to a softer coral — the specific saturated orange is brand
Don't add saturated brand-blue accents — the chrome is dark + orange
